Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/test/task2/CMakeLists.txt:
     1	file(REAL_PATH ../rtlib _rtlib_dir)
     2	file(REAL_PATH ../task0 _task0_out BASE_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
     3	file(REAL_PATH ../task1 _task1_out BASE_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
     4	
     5	# 生成官方测例表
     6	if(NOT TASK2_CASES_TXT)
     7	  set(_task2_cases "")
     8	  foreach(_case ${TEST_CASES})
     9	    if(NOT _case MATCHES ${TASK2_EXCLUDE_REGEX})
    10	      list(APPEND _task2_cases ${_case})
    11	    endif()
    12	  endforeach()
    13	  set(TASK2_CASES_TXT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/cases.txt)
    14	  string(REPLACE ";" "\n" _lines "${_task2_cases}")
    15	  file(WRITE ${TASK2_CASES_TXT} "${_lines}")
    16	else()
    17	  exec_program(
    18	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
    19	    ARGS common.py ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    20	         ${TASK2_CASES_TXT}
    21	    OUTPUT_VARIABLE _task2_cases)
    22	endif()
    23	
    24	# 生成官方测例答案
    25	add_custom_target(
    26	  task2-answer
    27	  ${Python3_EXECUTABLE}
    28	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/answer.py
    29	  ${_task0_out} # 输入目录
    30	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} # 输出目录
    31	  ${TASK2_CASES_TXT} # 测例表
    32	  ${CLANG_EXECUTABLE} # clang 路径
    33	  ${_rtlib_dir} # rtlib 路径
    34	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    35	  USES_TERMINAL
    36	  SOURCES answer.py)
    37	
    38	add_dependencies(task2-answer task0-answer)
    39	
    40	# 对官方标准实验进行评分
    41	add_custom_target(
    42	  task2-score
    43	  COMMAND
    44	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py ${TEST_CASES_DIR}
    45	    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK2_CASES_TXT} ${CTEST_COMMAND}
    46	    ${TASK2_LOG_LEVEL}
    47	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    48	  USES_TERMINAL
    49	  SOURCES score.py)
    50	
    51	add_dependencies(task2-score task2 task2-answer)
    52	
    53	# 为每个官方测例创建一个测试和评分
    54	if(TASK2_REVIVE)
    55	  # 如果启用复活，则将前一个实验的标准答案作为输入
    56	  add_dependencies(task2-score task1-answer)
    57	
    58	  foreach(_case ${_task2_cases})
    59	    set(_output_dir ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${_case})
    60	    file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${_output_dir})
    61	    add_test(NAME task2/${_case}
    62	             COMMAND task2 ${_task1_out}/${_case}/answer.txt
    63	                     ${_output_dir}/output.json)
    64	    add_test(
    65	      NAME test2/${_case}
    66	      COMMAND
    67	        ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
    68	        ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK2_CASES_TXT}
    69	        ${CTEST_COMMAND} ${TASK2_LOG_LEVEL} --single ${_case})
    70	  endforeach()
    71	
    72	  message(AUTHOR_WARNING "在实验二复活：请在构建 task1-answer 后再使用 task2 的测试项目。")
    73	
    74	else()
    75	  # 否则以实验零的标准答案作为输入
    76	  add_dependencies(task2-score task0-answer)
    77	
    78	  foreach(_case ${_task2_cases})
    79	    set(_output_dir ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${_case})
    80	    file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${_output_dir})
    81	    add_test(NAME task2/${_case} COMMAND task2 ${_task0_out}/${_case}
    82	                                         ${_output_dir}/output.json)
    83	    add_test(
    84	      NAME test2/${_case}
    85	      COMMAND
    86	        ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
    87	        ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK2_CASES_TXT}
    88	        ${CTEST_COMMAND} ${TASK2_LOG_LEVEL} --single ${_case})
    89	  endforeach()
    90	
    91	  message(AUTHOR_WARNING "实验二复活已禁用，请在构建 task0-answer 后再使用 task2 的测试项目。")
